records.description: Node.js module resolution failure — ensure NODE_PATH includes local node_modules

records.stderr_pattern: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '([^']*package\.json[^']*)'
records.description: package.json not found — cwd may be wrong; rewrite to directory containing package.json

records.stderr_pattern: EACCES: permission denied|npm ERR! Error: EACCES
records.description: npm cache permission error — redirect npm cache to writable directory

records.stderr_pattern: JavaScript heap out of memory|FATAL ERROR:.*Reached heap limit
records.description: Node.js V8 heap OOM — increase max old space size
ESM module resolution failure — set NODE_PATH and enable node resolution
